data.title: Binance Alpha Launch: Roam (ROAM)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Alpha launched Roam (ROAM).
Contract address: 0x3fefe29da25bea166fb5f6ade7b5976d2b0e586b

data.title: When Binance Alpha Points reaches 247, you can spend 15 Alpha Points to redeem 372 ROAM airdrops
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Binance Alpha platform announced that it has launched the Roam (ROAM) airdrop claim event. Starting from 21:00 on June 13, Beijing time, qualified users with at least 247 Alpha points can claim 372 ROAM tokens on the Alpha event page.
This claim will consume 15 Alpha points, and users must complete the claim within 24 hours after the opening. Overdue will be deemed as abandonment.

data.title: Bill to protect French crypto millionaires from kidnapping spike gains momentum
data.description:
A new bill meant to improve the personal security of French crypto entrepreneurs, targeted in a string of recent kidnapping attacks, has been drafted and filed in Paris. The legislative initiative coincides with ongoing arrests of suspects in multiple cases that are still under investigation, while authorities are working hard to end the wave of […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bill-to-protect-french-crypto-millionaires/

data.title: Pi Coin: Expert Reveals Why Pi Network’s GCV Vision Is Unrealistic
data.description:
The Pi Network price is currently the subject of the market’s attention due to arguments against a community-driven concept, GCV, and its price action. A top market expert has argued that the GCV vision is unrealistic. Amid this controversial discussion, the price of Pi Coin (PI) is still fighting to regain momentum
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/13/pi-coin-expert-reveals-why-pi-networks-gcv-vision-is-unrealistic/

data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump is scheduled to hold discussions with Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu today. The meeting aims to address key issues concerning bilateral relations and regional stability.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming Becomes Leading Ethereum Holder Among Public Companies
data.description: According to BlockBeats, market reports indicate that SharpLink Gaming has acquired Ethereum worth $463 million. This purchase positions SharpLink Gaming as the public company with the largest Ethereum holdings.

data.title: KOL Flyra Protocol will officially start mining and open trading on June 14, 2025
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News KOL Flyra Protocol announced that it will officially start mining and open trading on June 14, 2025. According to the official introduction, Web3 Financial Technology Group MCN Global was established in 2024, including McnEx Exchange, McnX AI Trading Ecosystem, MCN Labs Investment Incubation and Mchat Social Platform.
McnEX Exchange Main Ecosystem KOL Flyra Protocol is an AI traffic aggregation platform. Its core feature is to realize value confirmation and traffic realization by combining physical devices with on-chain digital assets. Each device is bound to a unique digital fingerprint (Device ID) to generate an unalterable RWA certificate, thereby ensuring that physical devices provide underlying value support for digital assets.

data.title: SharpLink Gaming has spent $463 million to buy 176,271 ETH
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to market news, SharpLink Gaming has spent US$463 million to buy 176,271 ETH, becoming the company with the most Ethereum among listed companies.
